requirement_topic.en: MINCOM Radio Type Approval and Frequency Permit — Turkmenistan Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: MINCOM无线电型号核准与频率许可——土库曼斯坦电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: MINCOM無線電型號核准與頻率許可——土庫曼電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Turkmenistan market must obtain type approval (registration) and, where applicable, a frequency permit from MINCOM (the Ministry of Communications of Turkmenistan — Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň), which regulates the entire telecom and radio spectrum in Turkmenistan. MINCOM type approval is a Turkmenistan-specific national requirement entirely separate from any EAEU-based system; Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member and EAC marking carries no weight with MINCOM. All Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz), Bluetooth, Zigbee, cellular, and other radio-frequency devices are within scope. Use of the 5 GHz Wi-Fi band requires a dedicated MINCOM frequency permit in addition to type approval. The telecom infrastructure market is a state monopoly under Turkmentelekom; all device approvals must be in place before import and sale. Russian-language technical documentation is accepted and generally expected for submissions.
summary.zh: 所有投放土库曼斯坦市场的无线电及电信终端设备，均须取得MINCOM（土库曼斯坦通信部——Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň）的型号核准（注册），并视情况取得频率许可。MINCOM负责管理土库曼斯坦全部电信及无线电频谱。MINCOM型号核准是土库曼斯坦特有的国家要求，与任何基于EAEU的体系完全独立；土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员，EAC标志对MINCOM不具任何效力。所有Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、蓝牙、Zigbee、蜂窝及其他射频设备均在适用范围内。使用5GHz Wi-Fi频段须在型号核准之外额外取得MINCOM频率许可。电信基础设施市场由土库曼电信国家垄断；所有设备核准须在进口及销售前到位。申报材料通常以俄语提交，亦可接受俄语技术文件。
summary.zht: 所有投放土庫曼市場的無線電及電信終端設備，均須取得MINCOM（土庫曼通信部——Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň）的型號核准（註冊），並視情況取得頻率許可。MINCOM負責管理土庫曼全部電信及無線電頻譜。MINCOM型號核准是土庫曼特有的國家要求，與任何基於EAEU的體系完全獨立；土庫曼不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員，EAC標誌對MINCOM不具任何效力。所有Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、藍牙、Zigbee、蜂窩及其他射頻設備均在適用範圍內。使用5GHz Wi-Fi頻段須在型號核准之外額外取得MINCOM頻率許可。電信基礎設施市場由土庫曼電信國家壟斷；所有設備核准須在進口及銷售前到位。申報材料通常以俄語提交，亦可接受俄語技術文件。

standards_or_laws: Law of Turkmenistan 'On Communications' — establishes MINCOM's authority over telecom and radio equipment type approval and spectrum management
MINCOM (Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň) — Ministry of Communications of Turkmenistan, regulates radio frequency allocation and telecom terminal equipment approval
Turkmenistan radio frequency regulations — MINCOM frequency permit required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi and certain other bands
GOST-TM standards (Türkmenstandart) — national standards mirroring GOST-R, applied in type approval evaluation

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices require SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) radio type approval for radio transmission modules and equipment, administered under MIIT. Devices using Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and other radio frequencies must obtain an SRRC approval number before sale in China. Terminal equipment (routers, modems, cellular devices) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese SRRC approval and NAL are not recognised by MINCOM and cannot substitute for Turkmenistan type approval. Test data generated to Chinese national standards (GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi, YD/T series for cellular) may serve as background documentation but full evaluation by MINCOM-accepted laboratories against GOST-TM standards is required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，工业和信息化部下属）的无线电型号核准，适用于无线电发射模块及设备。使用Wi-Fi、蓝牙及其他射频的设备须在中国销售前取得SRRC核准号。终端设备（路由器、调制解调器、蜂窝设备）还须额外取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。中国SRRC核准和NAL不被MINCOM承认，不可替代土库曼斯坦型号核准。依据中国国家标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11，蜂窝适用YD/T系列）产生的测试数据可作为背景文件，但须由MINCOM认可实验室按GOST-TM标准重新进行全面评估。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，工業和信息化部下屬）的無線電型號核准，適用於無線電發射模組及設備。使用Wi-Fi、藍牙及其他射頻的設備須在中國銷售前取得SRRC核准號。終端設備（路由器、調製解調器、蜂窩設備）還須額外取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可證（NAL）。中國SRRC核准和NAL不被MINCOM承認，不可替代土庫曼型號核准。依據中國國家標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11，蜂窩適用YD/T系列）產生的測試數據可作為背景文件，但須由MINCOM認可實驗室按GOST-TM標準重新進行全面評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi, WLAN)
YD/T series — MIIT industry standards for cellular terminal equipment

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by MINCOM and provide no pathway to Turkmenistan market access. A dedicated MINCOM type approval application must be filed, with technical documentation in Russian, supported by test reports from MINCOM-accepted laboratories evaluated against GOST-TM standards. An additional MINCOM frequency permit is required specifically for 5 GHz Wi-Fi band use. Products imported or sold without valid MINCOM type approval are subject to confiscation, import refusal, and administrative penalties. The state-controlled nature of the market means enforcement is conducted through both MINCOM and Turkmentelekom-linked channels. CE and FCC marks are similarly not recognised. Timeline varies but approvals in Turkmenistan can take longer than EAEU markets given the more restricted regulatory access environment.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准和工业和信息化部NAL不被MINCOM承认，无法为进入土库曼斯坦市场提供任何途径。须以俄语提交专项MINCOM型号核准申请，并附上MINCOM认可实验室按GOST-TM标准出具的测试报告。使用5GHz Wi-Fi频段须额外申请MINCOM频率许可。未取得有效MINCOM型号核准即进口或销售的产品，将面临没收、拒绝进口及行政处罚。市场的国家管控性质意味着执法通过MINCOM和土库曼电信关联渠道双重进行。CE和FCC标志同样不被承认。审批周期不定，但鉴于监管渠道较为受限，土库曼斯坦的核准周期通常比欧亚经济联盟市场更长。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准和工業和信息化部NAL不被MINCOM承認，無法為進入土庫曼市場提供任何途徑。須以俄語提交專項MINCOM型號核准申請，並附上MINCOM認可實驗室按GOST-TM標準出具的測試報告。使用5GHz Wi-Fi頻段須額外申請MINCOM頻率許可。未取得有效MINCOM型號核准即進口或銷售的產品，將面臨沒收、拒絕進口及行政處罰。市場的國家管控性質意味著執法通過MINCOM和土庫曼電信關聯渠道雙重進行。CE和FCC標誌同樣不被承認。審批週期不定，但鑑於監管渠道較為受限，土庫曼的核准週期通常比歐亞經濟聯盟市場更長。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MINCOM type approval required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import and sale in Turkmenistan; additional MINCOM frequency permit required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (and MIIT NAL for terminal equipment) required before sale in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Communications of Turkmenistan (MINCOM — Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MINCOM type approval is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio devices sold in Turkmenistan. Turkmenistan is not in the EAEU; EAC marking does not apply. Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute. A dedicated MINCOM application with GOST-TM-based test reports in Russian is required. 5 GHz Wi-Fi additionally requires a separate MINCOM frequency permit.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MINCOM型号核准对所有在土库曼斯坦销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备为强制要求。土库曼斯坦不在欧亚经济联盟内，EAC标志不适用。中国SRRC核准不可替代。须以俄语提交附有GOST-TM测试报告的专项MINCOM申请。5GHz Wi-Fi还须额外取得MINCOM频率许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MINCOM型號核准對所有在土庫曼銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備為強制要求。土庫曼不在歐亞經濟聯盟內，EAC標誌不適用。中國SRRC核准不可替代。須以俄語提交附有GOST-TM測試報告的專項MINCOM申請。5GHz Wi-Fi還須額外取得MINCOM頻率許可。
